summary: Frontend-only smoke test of design/UX refresh (loader, classes card, attendance sheet, dashboard hero, sidebar). All 5 areas verified working end-to-end after logging in via the role-picker -> admin/12345678.
critical_code_review_comments: Attendance.js view-tab Class/Section <Select> components don't carry data-testid (only the take-tab does). Adding data-testid='view-attendance-class-select' and 'view-attendance-section-select' would make future regression tests far more deterministic.
Attendance sheet letter cells use rounded-md not a perfect square radius (looks fine visually). Spec said 'rounded squares' - current implementation is acceptable.

Classes.js card still renders the className twice visually (once inside the gradient tile via <span> with the same number, and once next to the 'CLASS' label). This appears intentional per the new design, so not flagged as a bug, but if the request to 'remove duplicate Class X text' intended only one occurrence of the number, consider removing the number inside the gradient tile and keeping the BookOpen icon alone.
test_credentials: Super Admin: admin/12345678 (login via role-admin-staff-btn first)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing classes (TestClass, 1st Class, TestClass5) and existing attendance records on 1st Class - A (13 records across 7 working days).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login flow REQUIRES clicking data-testid='role-admin-staff-btn' BEFORE filling login-username/login-password/login-submit-btn. After login, wait for [data-testid='total-students-stat'] rather than wait_for_url('**/') since both login and dashboard share '/'. The view-attendance tab class/section selectors are unlabeled <Select> components — use page.locator('button[role=combobox]').nth(0)/(1) and role=option items. Attendance letter cells live at '.w-7.h-7' with title attribute 'YYYY-MM-DD: status'. Global loader element is always mounted at [data-testid='global-loader'] and toggles opacity-0/opacity-100; use wait_for_function on classList.contains('opacity-100') to catch it.

verified_areas.loader: global-loader element always in DOM (count=1). Captured 'opacity-100' class during /classes initial GET and during login submit. Inner gradient div has 'animate-loader-bar' as required.
verified_areas.classes: 3 cards rendered. No duplicate 'Class X' literal heading (occurrences=0). BookOpen icon stacked above class number inside 64x64 gradient tile. data-testid='edit-class-{n}' and 'delete-class-{n}' visible=true without hover.
verified_areas.attendance_sheet: View-Attendance tab on 1st Class/Section A loaded 13 records, 7 working days. 'Daily Records' text gone (count=0). 'Attendance Sheet' header present. Bordered grid with sticky Roll (.sticky.left-0) and Student (left-[52px]) columns. 14 letter cells w-7 h-7: 8 P (emerald-500), 2 A (rose-500), 0 H, 4 '-' (slate-50). Date headers show day/month stacked. Tooltips via title attr verified ('2026-04-11: absent'). Legend P/A/H/- present. Zebra rows present.
verified_areas.dashboard: Dark gradient hero (from-slate-900 via-slate-800 to-indigo-900) with 'Good Morning, Admin' greeting + subtitle 'Here's what's happening at your school today.' + glass tiles 'Today 16 Jun' and 'ATT. 25%'. All 4 stat cards visible: Total Students 8 (enrolled), Present Today 2 (25% rate), Absent Today 1 (today), Fees Collected ₹35,900 (lifetime). Quick actions all 3 visible and route correctly: quick-add-student->/students, quick-mark-attendance->/attendance, quick-collect-fee->/fees.
verified_areas.sidebar: bg-white/80 + backdrop-blur-sm class confirmed on sidebar root. Active nav (nav-dashboard) has bg-gradient-to-r from-sky-500 to-indigo-500 + shadow-sky-200.

rca of the issue: N/A - no issues found. All four design updates land correctly.
